summary: Bot Battle feature testing completed successfully. All critical flows verified: Play with Bot button opens Bot Difficulty modal, difficulty options display correctly (Easy unlocked, others locked with progress), photo selection shows 7 minted photos with images and full stats, 5-photo selection validation works, Start Battle successfully initiates bot battle, Battle Arena displays Round 1 with player's photos and opponent ready status.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Play with Bot button (data-testid='legacy-mode-btn') opens BotDifficultySelector modal without errors
VERIFIED: Bot Difficulty modal displays all 4 options: Easy (unlocked), Medium, Hard, Extremely Hard (locked with 0/3 progress)
VERIFIED: Photo selection shows 7 minted photos with actual images from picsum.photos
VERIFIED: Photo cards display: Level (Lv1-Lv7), Scenery type (Water/Natural/Man-made), Dollar Value ($440M-$890M), Strengths/Weaknesses, Hearts, Stamina (100%)
VERIFIED: 5-photo selection validation works - counter shows '5/5' when 5 photos selected
VERIFIED: Start Battle button enabled after selecting 5 photos
VERIFIED: Bot battle starts successfully - shows 'Easy Bot Battle started! Bet: 100 BL' toast
VERIFIED: Battle Arena displays Round 1 with player's 5 photos and 'Opponent has selected their photo' message
VERIFIED: Backend API /api/photo-game/bot-battle/start returns success with session_id, player_photos, bot_photos, and bot_config
seed_data_creation: None - used existing 7 minted photos for test user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bot Battle feature fully functional. Route is /photo-game (not /game). User has 7 minted photos with 100% stamina. Easy Bot is unlocked by default. Higher difficulties require 3 wins against previous level. Backend endpoints verified: /api/photo-game/battle-photos, /api/photo-game/bot-battle/stats, /api/photo-game/bot-battle/start

mocked_apis.hearts_counter: Social reaction hearts counter uses mocked data (not integrated with Facebook Graph API)
